Class Index

java.lang.Object
recoder.util.Index
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable
public class Index extends Object implements Cloneable
Implements an object-to-index assignment. An object can be assigned a long value. This is required to avoid repeated creations of pseudo objects representing numbers.

    • get

      public long get(Object key)
      retrieves the assigne long value for the given object.
      Parameters:
      key - the objct to look for
      Returns:
      the assigned long value, or -1L if there is none.

    • put

      public long put(Object key, long value)
      assigns the given long value to the specified key.
      Parameters:
      key - the object to assign a value to
      value - the long value to be assigned. This value must be greater or equal to 0
